title: citrusy glassy french jelly bake
description: a monsoon french dish featuring dark soy sauce, wood-fired-bake, and a low-carb-friendly twist.
instructions: mix eggs, almond flour, sugar, and xanthan gum in a bowl.
add soy sauce and mix well.
add orange and lemon juice and zest, and mix until combined.
pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish.
bake for 25 minutes, then reduce the oven temperature to 3250f and continue baking for another 15-20 minutes, or until the edges are set but the center is still slightly jiggly.
allow the bake to cool to room temperature before refrigerating it overnight.
once chilled, use a spatula to loosen the edges of the bake and invert it onto a serving plate.
serve chilled, garnished with orange and lemon zest if desired.
cut into 12 equal-sized squares and serve.
keep leftovers refrigerated for up to 5 days.
consume within 24 hours of opening for optimal freshness.
